prefillPrompt: Show me what my competitors are doing in paid ads

hero.headline: Your competitors are running 100 campaigns.
hero.headlineMuted: You are still building reports manually.
hero.subhead: Toffu connects to your ad accounts and your competitors' public data. It shows you exactly where they are ahead and executes the campaigns to close the gap.

demo.content: What are my competitors doing that I'm not?
Scanning Meta Ad Library, Google Ads Transparency, and your active campaigns...
Comparing 3 competitors across 14 ad angles, keywords, and landing pages...

**Competitor Gap Report**
You: 4 active campaigns | Competitor A: 31 campaigns | Competitor B: 18 campaigns

---

**Gaps found (things they are running, you are not):**

1. **Competitor A** is running 6 ads on the angle 'Replace your agency with AI' targeting Marketing Directors. You have no campaigns on this angle. Estimated monthly spend: $8,000-$14,000.

2. **Both competitors** are bidding on your branded keywords on Google. You are not running branded defense. Estimated lost clicks per month: 1,200.

3. **Competitor B** launched a free trial campaign 11 days ago. It is their highest-spend ad set. You have no free trial offer live.

---

**What I can build now:**
- A 'Replace your agency' campaign matching their angle
- A branded keyword defense campaign ($800/mo budget)
- A free trial ad set with 3 creative variants

Say 'build them' and I'll have all three live in 10 minutes.

findings.title: The gap between you and your competitors is measurable.

items.title: Ad angles you are missing
items.desc: Toffu reads every live competitor ad in the Meta Ad Library and Google Transparency Center. It tells you which angles they are running that you are not, and how long they have been running them.

items.title: Keywords they own that you do not
items.desc: Competitor bidding on your brand, your category, your product names. Toffu surfaces every gap in your keyword coverage and estimates the click volume you are losing.

items.title: Budget and scale comparison
items.desc: How many campaigns are they running? How fast are they scaling? Toffu estimates competitor spend ranges so you know who is outpacing you and by how much.

items.title: Landing pages and offers
items.desc: Free trial, demo, discount, ROI calculator. Toffu checks what offers your competitors are pushing and whether you have a comparable answer in market.

items.title: Creative velocity
items.desc: How often are they launching new ads? High creative velocity usually means a strong performance signal. Toffu tracks how many new ads each competitor launched in the last 30 days.

items.title: Campaigns built to close the gap
items.desc: Toffu does not just report. It proposes the campaigns to close each gap and builds them when you say go.

steps.title: Connect your ad accounts
steps.desc: Google Ads, Meta Ads, and your competitors' domains. OAuth in 60 seconds. Toffu reads your live campaigns and scans public competitor ad data automatically.

steps.title: Ask what you want to know
steps.desc: 'What are my competitors running that I am not?' or 'Who is bidding on my brand?' Toffu reads across all sources and builds a gap report in seconds.

steps.title: Build and launch
steps.desc: Toffu proposes the campaigns. You approve. It sets up the creatives, targeting, budgets, and keywords and launches.

afterSection.title: Close the gap in the same session.
afterSection.subhead: Most teams spend a week turning a competitor report into a campaign brief. Toffu does it in minutes.

items.title: New campaigns built to match their angles
items.desc: Toffu writes the headlines, descriptions, and targeting. You review. It launches.

items.title: Branded defense live in 10 minutes
items.desc: Stop losing clicks to competitors bidding on your name. Toffu sets up the campaign and bids immediately.

items.title: Weekly gap monitoring
items.desc: Toffu checks competitor activity every week and alerts you when they launch something new you should respond to.

faq.question: Where does Toffu get competitor ad data?
faq.answer: Meta Ad Library and Google Ads Transparency Center are public. Toffu reads both and correlates with your own campaign data to find the gaps.

faq.question: Do I need to know my competitors upfront?
faq.answer: No. Toffu can suggest competitors based on your industry, keywords, and audience, or you can name them directly.

faq.question: Can Toffu build the campaigns it identifies?
faq.answer: Yes. Once it identifies a gap, it proposes a full campaign with targeting, budget, and creative. You approve and it launches.

faq.question: How often does it update competitor data?
faq.answer: On demand and on a schedule you set. Most teams run a weekly competitor scan to catch new campaigns early.

finalCta.title: Your competitors are not waiting.
finalCta.subhead: Every week you spend building reports manually is a week they are running campaigns you have not seen yet.

seo.title: See Your Competitor Ad Gap Instantly | Toffu AI
seo.description: Your competitors are running campaigns you do not know about. Toffu scans Meta Ad Library and Google Transparency to show you exactly what they are doing and builds campaigns to close the gap.
seo.ogTitle: Your Competitors Found Toffu. Have You?
seo.ogDescription: See every ad angle, keyword, and campaign your competitors are running that you are not.
